description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, featuring a smooth, curved surface for skating and graffiti art decorating its exterior and interior. The structure includes metal safety railings along the top edges and a stairway with a platform for access. The ramp shows signs of wear, with visible stains, scuffs, and weathering, especially on the wood and metal surfaces. There is a cut-out section in the middle of one side, possibly for entry or as an additional play feature. The graffiti is colorful and varied, adding an urban, street-art aesthetic. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for skateboarding, BMX, or similar activities.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal railings, stair access, and colorful graffiti art, showing signs of wear and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stairway, platform, and prominent graffiti on the exterior wall.
description_view_1: Interior view of the half-pipe, highlighting the curved skating surface, graffiti, and stains inside.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a large graffiti mural, a cut-out entry, and weathered surfaces.
description_view_3: Interior perspective from the opposite end, showing the full length of the ramp and the stairway structure.
